text:
Once upon a time in the enchanted forest of Eldoria, there was a small village where the residents lived in harmony with nature. Among them was a young girl named Qwen, who had a special bond with the magical creatures that roamed the woods.

Qwen loved to spend her days exploring the forest, where she would often meet the wise old owl, Owli, and the playful pixie, Flicker. One day, as she wandered deeper into the forest than ever before, she came across a clearing where the trees shimmered with a mysterious glow.

Curious, Qwen approached the glowing area and found a tiny, injured dragon lying on the ground. Its scales were dull, and it looked weak and frightened. Without hesitation, Qwen gently picked up the dragon and brought it back to her village.

The villagers were amazed to see such a rare sight. They helped nurse the dragon back to health, and soon enough, its scales sparkled once more, and its wings regained
